title: post api generate skill with valid content
description: Test POST /api/generate-skill with valid creator_content of at least 40 characters and optional parameters to verify successful skill package generation, response structure, and file contents.

title: post api generate skill with short content
description: Test POST /api/generate-skill with creator_content shorter than 40 characters to verify that the API returns a 422 validation error.

title: post api generate skill with include zip and persist options false
description: Test POST /api/generate-skill with include_zip and persist_to_disk set to false to verify the response contains null output_path and zip_path and generated files without persistence.

title: post api generate skill with internal crewai failure
description: Simulate internal CrewAI pipeline failure during POST /api/generate-skill and verify the API returns a 500 internal server error with error details.

title: get api skills list generated skills
description: Test GET /api/skills to verify it returns a 200 response with an array of generated skill packages including metadata such as skill name, presence of SKILL.md, zip availability, and file list.

title: get api export skill zip download
description: Test GET /api/export/{skill_name}/zip with an existing skill_name to verify the API returns a 200 response with a valid application/zip file stream for download.

title: get api export skill zip not found
description: Test GET /api/export/{skill_name}/zip with a non-existent skill_name to verify the API returns a 404 error indicating zip not found.

title: get api export single file download
description: Test GET /api/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} with valid skill_name and safe file_path to verify the API returns a 200 response with the file content and correct content type.

title: get api export single file path traversal attempt
description: Test GET /api/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} with a path traversal attempt in file_path to verify the API returns a 400 error indicating invalid path.

title: post api export copy file content
description: Test POST /api/export/copy with valid skill_name and file_path to verify the API returns a 200 response with the raw file content for clipboard copy.
